parameters.query: ={{(() => { const ctx = $node['W3 Compute Yesterday Window'].json || {}; const wsRaw = String(ctx.forced_workspace_id || '').trim(); const ws = wsRaw.replace(/'/g, "''"); const uuidRe = /^[0-9a-f]{8}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[1-5][0-9a-f]{3}-[89ab][0-9a-f]{3}-[0-9a-f]{12}$/i; const wsFilter = uuidRe.test(wsRaw) ? (" AND workspace_id = '" + ws + "'") : ""; return "SELECT solution_id, workspace_id, channel, tone_recommendation, engagement_count, conversions, published, created_at FROM campaign_feedback WHERE created_at >= '" + String(ctx.start_utc).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'::timestamptz AND created_at < '" + String(ctx.end_utc).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'::timestamptz AND published = TRUE" + wsFilter + ";"; })()}}

={{(() => { const ctx = $node['W3 Compute Yesterday Window'].json || {}; const wsRaw = String(ctx.forced_workspace_id || '').trim(); const ws = wsRaw.replace(/'/g, "''"); const uuidRe = /^[0-9a-f]{8}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[1-5][0-9a-f]{3}-[89ab][0-9a-f]{3}-[0-9a-f]{12}$/i; const wsFilter = uuidRe.test(wsRaw) ? (" AND workspace_id = '" + ws + "'") : ""; return "SELECT id, campaign_id, workspace_id, channel, tone_recommendation, confidence_score, created_at FROM campaign_solutions WHERE created_at >= '" + String(ctx.start_utc).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'::timestamptz - INTERVAL '7 days' AND created_at < '" + String(ctx.end_utc).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'::timestamptz + INTERVAL '1 day'" + wsFilter + ";"; })()}}

parameters.jsCode: const updates = $json.workspace_updates || []; return updates.map(u => ({ json: u }));

parameters.query: ={{"INSERT INTO brand_memory (workspace_id, winning_tones_json, winning_channels_json, updated_at) VALUES ('" + String($json.workspace_id || '').replace(/'/g, "''") + "', '" + JSON.stringify($json.winning_tones_json || {}).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'::jsonb, '" + JSON.stringify($json.winning_channels_json || {}).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'::jsonb, '" + String($json.updated_at || new Date().toISOString()).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'::timestamptz) ON CONFLICT (workspace_id) DO UPDATE SET winning_tones_json = EXCLUDED.winning_tones_json, winning_channels_json = EXCLUDED.winning_channels_json, updated_at = EXCLUDED.updated_at RETURNING workspace_id;"}}

parameters.jsCode: const base = $node['W3 Compute Winning Patterns'].json; return [{ json: { start_utc: base.start_utc, end_utc: base.end_utc, workspaces_ranked: 0, workspaces_updated: 0, workspaces_failed: 0, status: 'no_data', trigger_mode: String($node['W3 Compute Yesterday Window'].json.trigger_mode || 'schedule'), completed_at: new Date().toISOString() } }];
